---
ID: US-CMP-FE-211
Title: Create/edit draft workflow
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-211
Epic: CMP-E2: Content Drafting and Asseting
---

As a contributor
I want to create and edit drafts with minimal friction so I can contribute content quickly.
So campaign content inventory grows without spreadsheet overhead.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Draft form supports required and optional fields from PRD.
- [ ] Draft save allows partial content with at least title or body.
- [ ] Submit for review button enables only when required fields are complete.
- [ ] Non-draft states render read-only for non-reviewer edits.
- [ ] Save operations provide synced/loading/error feedback.
